type: Dual-action insecticide (Ryanodine receptor activator + insect growth regulator)
mode_of_action_summary: Combination of chlorantraniliprole and methoxyfenozide provides dual control of chewing pests. Chlorantraniliprole activates ryanodine receptors causing muscle paralysis, while methoxyfenozide acts as an insect growth regulator disrupting molting and development of larvae.

active_ingredients.name: Chlorantraniliprole (CTPR)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Ryanodine receptor modulator causing muscle paralysis

active_ingredients.name: Methoxyfenozide
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Ecdysone receptor agonist disrupting insect molting

pest_behavior.leaf_feeding: Larvae feed on leaves reducing photosynthesis
pest_behavior.boring: Borers damage stems and fruits causing yield loss
pest_behavior.rapid_growth: Larvae grow quickly and cause severe crop damage

application_details.method: Uniform foliar spray ensuring coverage of leaves and growing points
application_details.coverage: Ensure thorough coverage for effective ingestion by larvae

farmer_benefits: کیڑے فوراً کھانا چھوڑ دیندے نیں

multilingual_description.english: Dual action insecticide for control of caterpillars and borers.
multilingual_description.urdu: سنڈیوں اور بوررز کے کنٹرول کے لیے ڈبل ایکشن دوا۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: سنڈیاں تے بورر کیڑیاں لئی ڈبل ایکشن سپرے۔

embedding_text: Tulip Plus 30 SC insecticide contains chlorantraniliprole and methoxyfenozide and is used for control of caterpillars bollworms and borers in cotton rice and vegetables. It stops feeding and disrupts growth providing long lasting control.
